title: add error type for the auth module
diff:
#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
enum AuthError {
    #[error("invalid token")]
    InvalidToken,
    #[error("expired at {0}")]
    Expired(u64),
    #[error("network error: {0}")]
    Network(#[from] reqwest::Error),
}
notes: Standard thiserror pattern; no anti-patterns.

title: add grep-like search helper
diff:
fn find_lines_containing(haystack: &str, needle: &str) -> Vec<usize> {
    haystack
        .lines()
        .enumerate()
        .filter_map(|(i, l)| if l.contains(needle) { Some(i) } else { None })
        .collect()
}
notes: Idiomatic iter/filter_map; no anti-patterns.

notes: Backoff helper; small, focused, no anti-patterns.

title: add command runner with timeout
notes: Busy-loop with sleep — well-known slop pattern; the deterministic layer's rules do not directly catch this, so this is a 'LLM should catch it' case. Marked slop on semantic grounds.
